headline: Roche (SWX:ROP) Launches First Fully Automated High Throughput Hepatitis D Test
summary: Roche Holding (SWX:ROP) has introduced the cobas HDV test, described as the first fully automated, high throughput assay for Hepatitis D Virus detection. The test is designed to support improved diagnosis and monitoring of Hepatitis D, which is considered the most aggressive form of viral hepatitis. The launch targets a major unmet clinical need and is intended to support laboratories as new HDV treatments become available. For investors tracking Roche Holding, the cobas HDV launch adds a...
